title: Mutuity
subtitle: Turn your local resources into shared value. Discover needs, publish resources, and coordinate across multiple campaigns.
loginDialogSubtitle: Connect to access bids, claims, chat, and your account workspace.

hero.bodyLine1: Find what you need, share what sits unused at home, and start saving today.
hero.bodyLine2: With Tope-là, you access items, services, and skills shared by your community. You reduce expenses, simplify daily life, and keep resources circulating instead of letting them go to waste.

audience.body: individuals, families, associations, and artisans who want to reuse, share, or exchange items, services, and skills, save money, build social ties, and contribute to a circular economy.

step1.title: Alpha version
step1.detail: Account and resource creation. Instant messaging.

step2.title: Beta version
step2.detail: Account customization. Notifications for instant messages and new resources.

step3.title: Stable version
step3.detail: A polished and fully functional version to begin serious growth.

step4.title: Contributor mode
step4.detail: For motivated users, Tope-là becomes a win-win game.

step5.title: Exchange campaigns
step5.detail: Targeted campaigns to launch the network.

step6.title: Collectivization
step6.detail: Tope-là gradually becomes a project fully self-managed by its users.
